name: Women's Dress – Electric Blue Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id="t21-img-clip"><rect x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="1350"/></clipPath>
    <linearGradient id="t21-img-fade" x1="0" y1="600" x2="0" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%"   stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.97"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <polygon points="580,0 1080,0 1080,560" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.06"/>
  <circle cx="900" cy="300" r="280" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.05"/>
  <circle cx="900" cy="300" r="240" fill="none" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.1"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#t21-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="0" y="0" width="1080" height="1350" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="0" y="600" width="1080" height="750" fill="url(#t21-img-fade)"/>
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="14" height="1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2"/>
  <rect x="40" y="40" width="320" height="64" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2"/>
  <text x="200" y="82" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="36" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="4">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>
  <circle cx="380" cy="72" r="6" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2"/>
  <text x="400" y="78" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.6" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>
  <text x="1040" y="72" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_URL</text>
  <text x="40"   y="1018" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="148" fill="#FFFFFF"                    letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="40"   y="1148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="148" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2" letter-spacing="-3">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>
  <text x="40"   y="1196" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="6">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_SUB</text>
  <line x1="40" y1="1218" x2="1040" y2="1218" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.2"/>
  <text x="40"   y="1268" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1</text>
  <text x="40"   y="1292" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="300" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.5" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL2</text>
  <text x="1040" y="1278" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="96" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>
  <text x="1040" y="1308" text-anchor="end" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="200" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.4" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_SUB</text>
  <rect x="0" y="1318" width="1080" height="32" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT2"/>
  <text x="540" y="1340" text-anchor="middle" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" letter-spacing="8">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>
</svg>

PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1.label: Detail line 1
PLACEHOLDER_DETAIL1.default: SIZES  XS · S · M · L · XL
